title_zh: 区分人群温度: warm audience 永远比 cold 高效
summary_zh: Ben Heath 强调: 投给已访问网站/订阅邮箱/参与过内容的 warm audience, 转化效率永远高于 cold audience。预算分配应优先 custom audience (网站访客 > 邮箱列表 > 互动用户 > 视频观看者 > 主页粉丝), 预算还有剩才扩到 cold。原理: warm 用户已对品牌有认知, 无需重复教育, 转化路径更短。
quote_en: Advertising to people that have visited your website, engaged with your content, joined your email list, or bought from you before, will always be much more effective than advertising to cold audiences.

title_zh: warm audience 必须按行为分层 segmentation 投不同 ad
summary_zh: 多数广告主对 warm audience 用同一条广告偷懒, 这浪费了分层潜力。正确做法: 按访问页面/兴趣类目把网站访客拆成多个 custom audience, 每个细分受众配独立创意, 推他们已经表现过兴趣的具体产品。原理: 不同行为信号代表不同购买意图阶段, 一刀切等于浪费数据。Amazon 类比: ASIN 维度区分浏览过/加车/已购可借鉴。
quote_en: Most businesses offer multiple products and services. But when it comes to advertising to their warm audiences on Facebook, they get lazy. They use the same ad for everyone, which just promotes one product or service.

title_zh: 直接卖服务给陌生人无效, 先用广告建 brand following
summary_zh: Heath 自述早期失败: 直接给陌生人投服务广告, 甚至送免费咨询都难成单。后切换为先投预算建品牌内容/粉丝沉淀, 再卖货, 业绩翻倍。原理: 没有内容/品牌信任的陌生人对硬广天然抗拒, 而粉丝群体对促销有 "排队购买" 效应。Amazon 启示: 单条 listing 想直接靠 SP cold 流量爆单很难, 配合 SB Brand Store / Posts 建品牌资产后转化更稳。
quote_en: I tried directly advertising my services to complete strangers which did not work I even gave away free consulting sessions in the hope that people would then use my services which barely worked.

title_zh: 内容定位: 服务类教育, 实物类娱乐
summary_zh: 创建 epic content 第一步是决定教育还是娱乐。服务型业务用教育内容(把行业 know-how 公开), 因为受众想学; 实物型品牌用娱乐内容(参考 Dollar Beard Club 的搞笑视频), 因为受众没有学习需求, 但会被有趣的内容拉进。原理: 内容形式必须匹配品类的购买决策心理, 选错只会做无效内容。
quote_en: for most service based businesses I think it makes more sense to educate because as a service provider you know things that your target market would like to know... for most product based businesses on the other hand it makes more sense to entertain.

title_zh: Exclusion Marketing: 已转化人群必须排除避免烧无效预算
summary_zh: Heath 用 "exclusion marketing" 把 cost per lead 从 £1.59 降到 £0.70 (-56%)。原理: Facebook 算法会持续把广告推给已点过的人, 但其中很多已转化, 继续投是浪费。做法: 装 pixel 跟踪转化, 在受众里把已购/已留资人群 exclude 掉。Amazon 类比: SD 受众投放时排除已购买 ASIN 的人群, 避免广告费打在 repeat 自然流量上。
quote_en: a lot of the people that have clicked on your Facebook ad will have converted into a lead or sell and continuing to advertise to those people is a waste of money you need to distinguish between those people that have clicked and converted

title_zh: campaign objective 决定算法优化方向, 选错从源头偏
summary_zh: 选 campaign type 等于选 objective, Facebook 会按这个目标去优化投递。比如 traffic campaign Facebook 就只优化点击, 不会管转化质量; 选 PPE (post engagement) 就只优化互动。原理: 算法的优化目标是黑盒里的 "最低成本动作", 你选什么它就给你什么, 选错 objective 等于让算法去做不直接产生收入的动作。Amazon 类比: SD 选 reach vs page visits vs purchases, 出价基准完全不同。
quote_en: by selecting a campaign type you are selecting an objective for your campaign this is very important because Facebook will optimize your campaign for that objective for example if you create a traffic campaign then Facebook will try to generate as much traffic as possible

title_zh: 暴力加预算扩量会烧穿目标人群, 必须切到新池子
summary_zh: Heath 警告: profitable campaign 想扩量, 直接加预算只能撑一段时间, 之后绝大多数目标人群已经看过广告, ROI 会快速崩盘。解法是创建 lookalike audience 切到新人群池继续扩。Amazon 启示: 单一 SP 关键词或 SD ASIN target 的人群有限, 长期加预算 ACOS 必涨, 真正的扩量是横向开新关键词组/新 ASIN target/新人群分组, 而不是堆 budget。
quote_en: what happens when you've burnt out your target audience at some point the majority of your target audience would have seen what you're advertising if you keep advertising to the same group of people then your profitable Facebook ad campaign will very quickly become not so profitable

title_zh: Lookalike 起步用 1% size, 越大越不准
summary_zh: 创建 LAL 时 Heath 默认推荐 1% size, 包含国家内最像 source 的 1% 人群; 选 5%/10% 受众更大但相似度衰减明显, 起步过大等于把 cold 池子混进来。原理: 受众扩大与质量是反比, 小池子起步验证转化效果再视情况扩。Amazon 启示虽弱(无 LAL), 但 "先小池子验证再扩量" 思路普适, 比如 SD audience 先用 narrow ASIN target 测出来再放宽。
quote_en: I would recommend creating a 1% look-alike audience as this will contain the 1% of Facebook users in the country you're targeting that are most similar to your source audience the larger the percentage you choose here the larger and less accurate your local our audience will be

title_zh: 广告文案只面向一个理想客户写, 想取悦所有人=取悦不了任何人
summary_zh: Heath 的 7 条文案技巧首条: 写广告文案时脑子里只装一个具体的理想客户, 像和这一个人对话。原理: 试图覆盖所有人的文案会变得空泛无差异, 没有人会觉得 "在说我"。Amazon 启示: 写 SP/SB 标题和 listing bullet 也要锁定核心买家画像 (use case + 痛点), 不要堆所有卖点。
quote_en: if your ad is trying to appeal to everyone then it'll end up appealing to no one it's best to write your ad copy with a single individual in mind imagine that you're talking to your absolute ideal customer.

title_zh: 一条广告只放一个 CTA, 多 CTA 等于稀释转化
summary_zh: Heath: 很多广告主同时让用户 "看博客 + 关注 Twitter + 买产品", 这是最常见的低效写法。如果真正想要的是销售/留资, 文案就只放购买/咨询这一个 CTA。原理: 多动作选项造成决策疲劳, 用户会两边都不点。Amazon 启示: SD 创意里别又喊 "Learn more" 又喊 "Add to cart", 选定一个动作把整条文案对齐。
quote_en: I've seen a lot of ads that are asking people to do two or three things when really the advertiser probably wants people to take one very specific action don't tell people to check out your blog or follow you on twitter if what you really want is leads and sales.

title_zh: scarcity 紧迫感措辞对 Facebook 广告效果立竿见影
summary_zh: Heath 多次实测稀缺性词汇 (hurry, today only, for a limited time, now) 对广告表现有显著拉动, 即使他自己每次都被惊讶到。原理: 稀缺性触发损失厌恶心理, 用户怕错过会立刻行动。Amazon 启示: SD/SB 文案/A+ 配合 Lightning Deal/Coupon 时可以加 "Limited Time Only", 也契合 Amazon 自己的 "Only X left" 紧迫机制。
quote_en: tip number 7 is to use scarcity any words that instill a sense of urgency will get your target market to respond including things like hurry now today only for a limited time makes a massive difference I'm always surprised at how much of an effects scarcity has

title_zh: Average Customer Value 决定你能出多高的广告价
summary_zh: Heath 强调跑广告的人必须盯 Average Customer Value: 同行 LTV £100, 你做到 £200 就能在 FB/Google 上出价压死对手抢量, 因为客户值更多钱。原理: 平台是出价竞价市场, 真正的护城河是单客价值而不是创意技巧。Amazon 启示: 提升 ACOS 容忍度的根本是提高客单价/复购 (bundle, Subscribe & Save), 不是无脑压 bid。
quote_en: if your average customer value in the same industry if you can increase that to two hundred pounds if you can have twice the average customer value that they have that means that you can go into the online advertising spaces you can go into Facebook and Google and you can afford to outbid them

title_zh: Upsell 时机最佳是结账前 Thank You 页之前, 不是事后邮件
summary_zh: Heath: 提升 ACV 最有效的不是涨价 (会丢客), 而是 upsell, 而且必须在用户刚下完单还没看到 Thank You 页时弹出第二/第三 offer, 此时下单冲动最强。事后邮件/再营销远不如即时 upsell。原理: 购买行为本身降低后续小额加单阻力。Amazon 启示: Frequently Bought Together / Subscribe & Save / Brand Store cross-sell 的位置选择就是这个逻辑, 把推荐放在加车后/购物车页价值最高。
quote_en: the absolute best way to do it is to catch them immediately after they've bought that initial product so before they hit the Thank You page they buy on the sales page before they you know they go through the checkout process before they hit the Thank You page right in there you want to hit them with your upsell

title_zh: 教育型视频广告最佳时长 2-4 分钟, 别为了短而砍内容
summary_zh: Heath 实测教育内容视频广告最佳长度 2-4 分钟: 留 10-15 秒 intro + 30 秒 CTA + 中间纯干货, 短于 2 分钟价值不够, 长于 4 分钟用户看见时长就放弃。产品演示按需缩短, 娱乐内容只要够好玩可以到 10-12 分钟。原理: 不是越短越好, 关键是 "刚好讲清楚"。Amazon 启示: SBV/Posts 视频卡死 15-30 秒是错的, 复杂品 (家电/工具) 2-3 分钟解构产品反而效果更好。
quote_en: the best length of educational video content on Facebook is around about 2 to 4 minutes long... I wouldn't go much shorter than 2 minutes either because remember you're going to have your intro which may take 10 15 seconds and then you're probably going to have some sort of call to action at the end

title_zh: 电商优先用 Carousel 多图广告, 单图正在被淘汰
summary_zh: Heath 实测 carousel ads 在电商场景几乎一直跑赢 single image: 一条广告同时展示多 SKU, 每张图独立 headline + CTA + 落地页, 算法还会自动把表现最好的图排首位; 方形图占垂直空间更大更吸睛; 多张图轮换天然抗 ad fatigue。原理: 多 SKU 覆盖了 target audience 内不同偏好的子人群。Amazon 启示: SB 多产品广告/SD 多 ASIN 创意比单一 ASIN 抗疲劳, 应优先选择多产品布局。
quote_en: carousel ads nearly always outperform single image ad... using multiple images that advertise a number of different products really helps with ad fatigue so if you were just advertising one product to the same audience over again they're going to become bored and fatigued with that ad very quickly

title_zh: Lead Ads 量大但质量差, 必须强制收手机号才救得回
summary_zh: Lead Ads 在 FB 内自动填表, 留资成本远低于跳转网站, 但 Heath 经验是质量明显劣化, 邮件根本不回。补救: 表单必须强制要求 phone number, 留资后 1-2 小时内电话跟进, 越晚越难转化。原理: 摩擦低 = 用户投入感低 = 后续响应率低, 必须在留资后立刻补摩擦。Amazon 启示弱 (无 lead form), 但通用结论是 "低门槛流量来源必须配高强度后续承接"。
quote_en: the leads that are generated through facebook lead ads and consistently worse quality than the leads that are generated from an equivalent campaign where people are sent to someone's website... because it is so easy for them to submit their contact information they're not as invested in the process

title_zh: 想要订单就选 Conversions, 不要继续用 Boost Post
summary_zh: Heath agency 80-90% 客户跑的都是 Conversions campaign, 接手新账户最常见的快速优化就是把客户原来的 traffic / engagement / boost post 改成 conversions。原理: Boost Post 默认是 PPE 目标, 算法只优化 like/comment, 不会优化购买。Amazon 启示: SD 选 "page visits" vs "purchases" objective, 选错后者算法压根不学转化信号; 始终用最贴近收入的 objective。
quote_en: I would say that 80 percent maybe even 90 percent of all the campaigns that we run for our clients are conversion campaigns and that's a way that we can often get a quick and easy win for our clients when we do take over their account is by converting their campaign objectives from traffic or engagement to conversions

title_zh: 总预算 10% 留给品牌曝光, 长期复利
summary_zh: Heath 建议在所有跑 conversions 的广告主, 总预算至少留 10% 跑 Brand Awareness campaign, 算法会优化 "能记住你品牌的人"。原理: 直效广告榨当下转化, 但品牌资产带来长期低成本流量, 全押直效会陷入越投越贵。Amazon 启示: SP/SD 转化导向之外要给 SB / Brand Store / Posts 留预算, 复购和品牌词搜索量是长期 ACOS 改善的关键。
quote_en: I would recommend that businesses advertising on Facebook dedicated at least 10% of their total ad budget to brand awareness campaigns because the effects over the long run can be very beneficial

title_zh: 推内容广告必须带 CTA, "裸内容" 浪费 hyper-responsive 流量
summary_zh: Heath: 大家都说推内容暖人群, 但只推光秃秃的内容 (naked content) 就漏掉一群叫 hyper-responsive 的小众人群——他们第一次看到就准备买。所以视频结尾必须有 CTA, 博客中间穿插自己产品广告。原理: 用 awareness 的内容也能直接接转化, 不需要等下一步。Amazon 启示: SBV 视频不能只展示功能, 末帧/口播必须 "Shop Now on Amazon", 即使主目标是建认知。
quote_en: there are a very small percentage of your target market called the hyper responsive that don't need to be warmed up they'll be ready to buy right now and that's why you want to include a call to action in your content you want to give those hype responses a chance to buy your products or services the first time they see your piece of content

title_zh: 提高 lead 质量靠加摩擦: 用日历预约替代普通表单
summary_zh: Heath: 投诉 "FB lead 质量差" 的根因不在 Facebook 而在落地页。把简单的联系表单换成日历预约 (Acuity 等), 让用户在你日程上自己选时段, 量会少但质量飙升, 因为肯花精力预约的都是真意向。原理: 适度摩擦过滤了 "随手填" 的伪 lead。Amazon 启示弱 (无 lead form), 但通用思路: 衡量流量质量时摩擦点的设计比量大重要。
quote_en: where possible I like to get my prospects to book a free phone call directly into my calendar... because this process is a lot more involved you are going to generate less leads... but the ones that are involved in the process that are really interested in your product or services they are going to do that so you're going to retain the higher quality leads

title_zh: Slideshow 单图秒数: 3-4 秒最佳, 太短看不清太长划走
summary_zh: Heath 实测 slideshow 广告每张图停留时长 3-4 秒最佳, 短了看不清产品, 长了用户不耐烦下滑。同时建议把 10 张图配额用满, 加 FB 自带 BGM 提升完播。原理: 视觉广告的节奏直接影响完播率与点击, 不是越快越好也不是越慢越细。Amazon 启示: SBV 视频如果是 slideshow 风格, 镜头切换 3-4 秒一组体感最舒服, 不要每张图压到 1 秒。
quote_en: from the testing we've done we found about three to four seconds is usually about right

title_zh: Cold audience frequency 上 2-2.5 就开始疲劳, 必须换素材
summary_zh: Heath 经验值: 对 cold 受众, frequency 升到 2-2.5 时 conversion cost 通常开始恶化, 此时该换创意/换受众/换 offer。Warm audience 池子小, frequency 9-15 都还能跑, 不必紧张。原理: 没听过你的人看 2 次广告就分流成转化或冷漠, 老用户重复曝光天然容忍。Amazon 启示: SP 高频曝光关键词若 CTR 跌、ACOS 涨, 优先想 "是否 frequency 太高" 而非压 bid。
quote_en: any an ad frequency of anything above about a two maybe a two and a half is when we usually start to see results drop off particularly to cold audiences... if you're advertising to warm audiences... with those you can go much much higher there's not really a number at which you might need to make adjustments you just have to gauge it

title_zh: frequency 高效解法三选一: 换素材 / 换人群 / 换 offer
summary_zh: frequency 偏高时三种修法: ① 换创意 (新视频/新主图/新标题) ② 换 targeting 把同一 offer 给到新人群 ③ 换 offer 给到同一人群。原理: 疲劳源是 "创意-受众-offer" 这个三元组的某一环重复, 任意切换一个就能继续榨剩下两环的价值。Amazon 启示: SD ASIN target 跑疲了, 别只换 bid; 要么换主图副本要么换 ASIN 范围要么换 promo 角度。
quote_en: one often simple way if you think that the offers really good and the targeting is really good is to change your ad creative... another option is obviously to change the targeting... perhaps you could offer them something else you could advertise a different service that you offer a different product

title_zh: Reach objective 适合限时促销和小本地受众, 普通转化别选
summary_zh: Reach objective 告诉算法 "覆盖最多人, 别重复", 默认 conversion-only objective 反而会反复推给同一批 "高潜" 用户。适合两个场景: ① 限时促销 (Easter/Christmas/flash sale) 必须在窗口期触达全部目标; ② 本地小受众 (5-10mi 内人口稀少) 受众池子本身小。原理: Reach 牺牲转化效率换覆盖广度, 用错了浪费预算。Amazon 启示: Prime Day/Black Friday 短窗口内 SD reach 类目标可短期开, 平时禁用。
quote_en: I think this is particularly useful if you're running a timely promotion so let's say for example you're running like a flash sale or something to do with like a holiday... where there's a time limit on it well you want to make sure that as many people within your target audience see your ad for whatever it is you're offering within that time window

title_zh: App install 类广告千万别先跳官网, 直接到商店
summary_zh: Heath 看过有客户把 app install 流量先送到自己网站再让用户去商店下载, 中间多一步丢一大半人。正确做法: 选 App Installs objective + 直接跳 App Store/Google Play, 减少所有中间步骤。原理: 转化路径每多一步流失率几何级上升 ("摩擦守恒定律")。Amazon 启示: SD 落地页直接打 PDP, 不要先到 Brand Store 索引页; 每多一跳 conversion 都掉。
quote_en: you don't want to do that with the app installs and add objective uses a sent directly from Facebook to the location where they can download the app... it's sort of a rule in digital marketing that you want to make things as easy as possible for people because if you do more people are going to do it if you have that extra step in there of taking people to your website first you're going to see drop-off rates

title_zh: 广告视频几乎一致优于图片, 哪怕是产品类
summary_zh: Heath: 在 Facebook 跨多 vertical 测试 video 几乎一直跑赢 image 广告, 因为 newsfeed 里 motion 自动抓眼, 静音也能传 message。Amazon 启示: SBV (Sponsored Brand Video) 在 search 结果页占据更大视觉空间且自动播放, 优先级应高于 SP/SB 静态广告; 即使没有 polished 视频, 简单产品 demo 也比静态主图好。
quote_en: video ads are better than image ads now this is basically true across Facebook as a platform videos are much more engaging... when videos show up in people's newsfeeds and either on their desktop or their mobile it's gonna grab them attention a lot more there's gonna be even though it starts on silent there's movement that's gonna grab

title_zh: lead magnet 的本质是 "加速达成" 而不是 "教学全集"
summary_zh: Heath 总结表现最好的 lead magnet 是帮目标客户 "更快达成他们本来就想达成的目标", 比如他自己做的 "五段式 FB 广告模板" 直接给现成结构, 比写一本电子书价值高。原理: 完整教学耗用户精力, 模板/清单类 "省时间" 资产命中目标用户的核心动机。Amazon 启示弱 (无 lead magnet), 但通用结论: A+ 内容/视频应该让买家更快做出购买决策, 而不是炫耀全部 feature。
quote_en: the best lead magnet help your target market achieve something they want to achieve but it helps them achieve it faster so if you take the example of the Facebook ad template... what it does is it helps them create Facebook ads that are highly effective faster than if they were trying to do it themselves

title_zh: 起步预算 $5-10/day 验证转化, 不要被预算定义压力绑架
summary_zh: Heath 给新手的预算建议: 不要纠结大数字, 起步 $5-10/day, 验证 conversion campaign 能跑通后再 scale。早期最大风险不是 "预算太小", 而是 "预算太大但学习信号不准"。Amazon 启示: 新 SP campaign 起步 $10-20/day 测 7-14 天, 看到稳定 ACOS 信号再阶梯加预算; 不要一上来就 $100/day 烧。
quote_en: what I usually say to people is start off small establish your something works and then look to scale up and if you want to start with you know something like five dollars a day ten dollars a day that could be a decent starting point

title_zh: 服务类广告必须出真人脸, 匿名公司号转化差
summary_zh: Heath 服务业 lead 漏斗的关键经验: 视频必须 face-to-camera 出真人, 因为服务交付方就是这个人, 客户在决定付钱前必须先认这张脸。匿名 logo 视频转化明显劣于真人。原理: 服务业本质是信任买卖, 真人脸是最低成本的信任信号。Amazon 启示: 中小品牌 SBV 视频里出现创始人/产品讲解员能显著提高品牌忠诚度, 比纯 B-roll 更有效。
quote_en: you can see that my face you know I'm face to camera this is a face to camera video and that's really important I think for service providers because the vast majority of service businesses... you or someone within your company is going to be interacting directly with your clients with your customers so they want to know that there's a real person

title_zh: Cold 视频广告卡死 2-4 分钟, 长了没人看到 CTA
summary_zh: Heath: 给 cold audience 投视频, 必须 2-4 分钟内结束, 因为视频结尾才是 CTA, 长视频用户根本到不了 CTA。原理: cold 用户耐心阈值很低, 信息密度优先于内容完整度。Amazon 启示: SBV/Posts 视频如果带 CTA, 节奏要前置, 关键 hook + CTA 不要拖到 30 秒后, 否则 CTA 永远展示不到。
quote_en: you can see that it's only three minutes and 14 seconds long and that's really important as a digital marketer I'd love attention spans online to be much much larger than they are but they're not too cold audiences to people who don't know who I am and I'm going to create a short video I think two to four minutes for this style of video is really important
